title: brickellia eupatorioides var. floridana
intro: Brickellia eupatorioides var. floridana, also known as false boneset, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States and the Caribbean. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Brickellia eupatorioides var. floridana has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting wound healing. Brickellia eupatorioides var. floridana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
